zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Norwich於1311年出生在英國諾福爾可諾維其時，她的父親Walter Norwich37歲，母親Catherine de Hethersett37歲。她和William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston至少有2個兒子。她去世於大約1342年在英國英格蘭享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Norwich于1311年出生在英国諾福爾可諾維其时，她的父亲Walter Norwich37岁，母亲Catherine de Hethersett37岁。她和William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston至少有2个儿子。她去世于大约1342年在英国英格兰享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Norwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): habitational name from the city of Norwich in Norfolk. The placename derives from Old English north ‘north, northern’ + wīc ‘specialized or outlying farm’.

variants.name: Northridge
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Norridge in Upton Scudamore (Wiltshire) or from a similarly named but unidentified places elsewhere. The placename derives from Middle English north ‘north’ + rigge ‘ridge’ (Old English north, hrycg). There may have been some confusion with Norwich .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Norwich was born in 1311, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, her father, Walter Norwich, was 37 and her mother, Catherine de Hethersett, was 37. She had at least 2 sons with William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston. She died about 1342, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Norwich est née en 1311, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Walter Norwich, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Hethersett, avait 37 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston. Elle est décédée environ 1342, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Norwich 1311 in Norwich, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Norwich 37 und ihre Mutter Catherine de Hethersett 37. Sie hatte mit William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1342 im Alter von 32 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Norwich è nata il nel 1311 nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Walter Norwich, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Catherine de Hethersett, aveva 37 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston. Morì circa 1342, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Norwich(이)가 1311년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Norwich(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de Hethersett(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1342년 영국 잉글랜드에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Norwich nasceu em 1311, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Norwich, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Hethersett, tinha 37 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1342, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Norwich родилась в 1311 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Norwich было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Hethersett, 37. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston. Она умерла около 1342 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Norwich nació en 1311, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Norwich, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Catherine de Hethersett, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston. Murió aproximadamente 1342, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 32 años.
